info.name: GraphQL – Pages Module
info.description: Pages: page, pages, pageContent, pagesByType, dashboardPages, marketingPages, etc. All queries public (no auth). No mutations in this API. Variables: use camelCase (pageId, pageType). See sql/apis/19_PAGES_MODULE.md (Queries – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query GetPage($pageId: String!) { pages { page(pageId: $pageId) { pageId title pageType status } } }","variables":{"pageId":"getting-started"}}

body: query":"query { pages { pages { pages { pageId title pageType } total } } }","variables":{}}

body.raw: {"query":"query Content($pageId: String!) { pages { pageContent(pageId: $pageId) { pageId content } } }","variables":{"pageId":"getting-started"}}

body: query":"query { pages { dashboardPages { pages { pageId title } total } } }","variables":{}}

body.raw: {"query":"query { pages { marketingPages { pages { pageId title } total } } }","variables":{}}
